name: WABASH NATIONAL Corp
business: Wabash National Corporation designs, manufactures, and services dry freight and refrigerated trailers, platform trailers, tank trailers, truck bodies, and other transportation equipment for first-to-final mile operations. The company also provides aftermarket parts, services, and digital solutions through its Wabash Hub and Trailers as a Service (TaaS) offerings.
sellsTo: dairy, food and beverage, pharmaceutical, chemical, and biotech markets

exposures.sentence: We design, manufacture, and service a diverse range of products supporting first-to-final mile operations, including dry freight and refrigerated trailers, platform trailers, tank trailers, dry and refrigerated truck bodies, structural composite panels and products, trailer aerodynamic solutions, and specialty food grade processing equipment.

Wabash was selected to receive a $1.6 million grant award from the U.S. Department of Energy Solar Energy Technologies Office (SETO) to support a research and development project aimed at decarbonizing the commercial transportation industry.

Linq Venture Holdings LLC. The Company continued to unify and expand its parts and services capabilities and ecosystem through its newly-acquired interest in Linq Venture Holdings LLC, (Linq) to develop and scale a digital marketplace in and for the transportation and logistics distribution industry.
Our Composites products focus on the use of DuraPlate composite panels and EcoNex TM Technology beyond the semi-trailer market.
